message:
🐛 Fix search-state push conflicts in concurrent workflow runs (#377)

* 🌱 Add daily schedule and auto-merge for mission PRs

- Change cron from weekly (Monday) to daily 6am UTC
- Add auto-merge job that scores mission PRs with quality-scorer
- PRs scoring >= 70/100 are auto-merged with squash
- PRs below threshold get a comment and stay open for review
- Tested both pass (82/100 → merged) and fail (24/100 → left open) paths

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix search-state push conflicts in concurrent runs

Add retry loop with fetch+rebase to handle parallel batch runs
all trying to push search-state.json to master simultaneously.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -170,9 +170,21 @@ jobs:
           if [ -f search-state.json ] && ! git diff --quiet search-state.json 2>/dev/null; then
             git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
             git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
-            git add search-state.json
-            git commit -s -m "🌱 Update CNCF mission search state ($(date +%Y-%m-%d))"
-            git push origin master
+            # Retry loop handles concurrent push conflicts from parallel batch runs
+            MAX_RETRIES=3
+            for attempt in $(seq 1 $MAX_RETRIES); do
+              git fetch origin master
+              git rebase origin/master || git rebase --abort
+              git add search-state.json
+              git diff --cached --quiet && break  # nothing to commit after rebase
+              git commit -s -m "🌱 Update CNCF mission search state ($(date +%Y-%m-%d))" || true
+              if git push origin master; then
+                echo "Search state pushed (attempt $attempt)"
+                break
+              fi
+              echo "Push failed (attempt $attempt/$MAX_RETRIES), retrying..."
+              sleep 2
+            done
           fi
       - name: Write workflow summary
         run: |
